title: cards: resolve relative og:image URLs to absolute
description: In fetch_card(), if a site uses a relative URL in og:image (e.g. content="/images/logo.png"), the image_url field is stored as-is. Mastodon clients expect an absolute URL and cannot render relative paths. Fix: use url::Url::join() against the fetched page URL to resolve relative og:image/twitter:image values to absolute URLs before storing.
